steps.title: Find the intersection
steps.content: The solution to a system of equations is the point where the two graphs intersect. Here, that is the marked point on both the line and the absolute value graph.

steps.title: Read the coordinates
steps.content: The marked point is halfway between $-4$ and $-3$ on the $x$-axis and halfway between $4$ and $5$ on the $y$-axis. Its coordinates are $$ (-\frac{7}{2},\frac{9}{2}) $$ The answer is C.
